rows.label: tev045401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev045401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Duna about the Bias way of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev045401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Duna if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Duna about her other siblings.

rows.label: tev045401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Duna about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045401_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Duna about Lao's betrayal.

rows.label: tev045401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Duna about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045401_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Duna what she will do next.

rows.label: tev045401_SEL2041
rows.name: Ask Duna about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045401_SEL3021
rows.name:
Ask Duna if she has
any interesting news.

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0001
rows.name:
You would not know it now, but
Bias were once great in number![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0002
rows.name: We are known for large families.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0003
rows.name:
My family wants me to marry.
Also my brother, Nemard. They
bother us about it every day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But who do they expect me to wed? Must I
pick from pathetic males remaining? I
could scrape better husband from boot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0005
rows.name:
*sigh* Show me Bias who is gentle,
yet still strong like mandos. THIS
Bias I will consider for mate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0010
rows.name:
In Growth captivity, we were worked
to bone. Nearly starved to death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0011
rows.name:
So when we came here, we
gorged ourselves on food.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0012
rows.name:
It is good to fatten up. But
I must get back in shape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Perhaps I will go on hunt.
Work up sweat. Then charm
future mate with toned body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1001
rows.name:
We once had many brothers and sisters.
They never got to see your city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1002
rows.name:
They died during wars with Cavern Clan.
Some quickly. Some tortured. But all dead.
Only me, Liana, and Nemard remain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1003
rows.name:
Nemard's wedding would have
brought joy to them all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1004
rows.name:
It was hard work to plan wedding. But
that knowledge makes effort worth it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1009
rows.name:
Nemard's wedding went well.
This is good. But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1010
rows.name: But now I get more pressure to marry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1011
rows.name:
Grandfather is cruel. He
views me as lost cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG1012
rows.name:
*sigh* Why does mate as strong as
mandos not come sweep me off feet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2001
rows.name: Lao betrayed you for Growth, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2002
rows.name:
Tree Clan believes in solidarity.
If our kin betrayed us, he
would get 5,000 lashes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2003
rows.name: ...If we did not give death first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2004
rows.name:
But you forgive traitor AND
rescue him! This seems soft.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2009
rows.name:
Now Nemard is married, and Hexuna, so
much younger than me, has child...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2010
rows.name:
I see nothing but pity in everyone's
eyes. They no longer even nag.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2011
rows.name: ...It hurt less when they nagged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2012
rows.name:
This would change if mate as
strong as mandos came along!
Strong Bias who deserves me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2017
rows.name:
I have found potential
husband in your city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2018
rows.name:
So great! He puts "man"
back in "mandos"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2019
rows.name:
...Who is this? It is your commander!
Man like big, muscular beast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2020
rows.name:
I saw him chase away simius near city
gate with bare hands. Oooooo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2021
rows.name:
I have never seen male so
dashing and strong. Do you
think he will take me as mate?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2026
rows.name:
Now Nemard is married, and Hexuna, so
much younger than me, has child...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2027
rows.name:
I see nothing but pity in everyone's
eyes. They no longer even nag.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2028
rows.name: ...It hurt less when they nagged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG2029
rows.name:
When will your mandos-like commander
realize he belongs with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG3001
rows.name:
I have friend named Thea. She lost
her husband before coming here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG3002
rows.name:
But Thea made her peace. Commended
her husband's soul to beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG3003
rows.name: Now she is able to dance again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045401_MSG3004
rows.name:
I admire her strength and courage. I
might not recover from such blow.[ST:wait ]
